a folded letter, edges soft from rereading
a brass key on a leather cord
a pocket watch without a chain
a wooden rosary, beads worn smooth
a child's drawing, folded into quarters
a suitcase with one broken latch
an enamel coffee cup, chipped at the rim
a pair of reading glasses, one lens cracked
a stack of photographs tied with string
a small leather notebook, pencil in the spine
a lantern with the glass smoked black
